violations.text: End cap produce shelf observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -MDU backwall and shelving -poultry area shelving New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
Air curtains at large chiller was observed in poor repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of various shelving (dry and cold) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
Air curtains at large chiller was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/07/2025
Refuse area was observed with an accumulation of debris and soil residue. Area is to be maintained to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
